name: Apricot Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 3-pound chicken.
2. Mix the apricot preserves, Russian dressing, and onion soup mix.
3. Arrange the chicken in a baking dish and pour the mixture over it.
4. Refrigerate and marinate for 3+ hours.
5. Bake at 325°F-350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour, until juices run clear.
6. To crisp the chicken, broil under high heat for the last 15 minutes of cooking.
7. Prepare the rice with parsley and serve the chicken over it.
Good Appetite!
